title: IIT Delhi Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Field Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Science/ relevant subjects from a recognized university with 3 years of work experience from a recognized institution or master's degree in the relevant subject or Pharm D (Doctor of Pharmacy) from a recognized institution
qualification.details: Graduate in Science/ relevant subjects from a recognized university with 3 years of work experience from a recognized institution or master's degree in the relevant subject or Pharm D (Doctor of Pharmacy) from a recognized institution.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Field Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Field Supervisor position is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Supervisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates should be graduates in Science or relevant subjects with 3 years of experience, or possess a Master's degree in a relevant subject, or have a Pharm D from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Field Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Field Supervisor post is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 32,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection process be conducted?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Field Supervisor position will involve an interview conducted through video conferencing mode.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Field Supervisor position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/126//2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.
